title: Tools to help the retail trader
author: Expensive-Badger-142
selftext: Hey yall I been working on this scanner for a 2 months now and I have many features in it. The calls have been pretty good but I think it can be improved. Would you be willing to try it and share your honest feedback? I love the to let $APH it’s considered one of the picks and shovels and one of the main reasons behind my strategy that led to building this. Yesterday it popped up as one of the main tickers on the dashboard and to me this was the ultimate validation. Would love to get some of your opinions
